breedimp_exile_from_dynasty_interaction = {
	icon = icon_dynasty
	category = interaction_category_hostile
	interface_priority = 60

	desc = breedimp_exile_from_dynasty_interaction_desc
	prompt = breedimp_exile_from_dynasty_interaction_prompt
	use_diplomatic_range = no

	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = breedimp_exile_prestige_cost_value
		}
	}

	is_shown = {
		scope:actor = {
			is_ai = no
			is_alive = yes
			is_dynast = yes
			dynasty = scope:recipient.dynasty
		}
		scope:recipient = {
			is_ai = yes
		}
		scope:actor != scope:recipient
	}

	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		custom_tooltip = {
			text = breedimp_exile_from_dynasty_interaction_invalid_tt
			scope:recipient = {
				breedimp_can_exile_dynasty_member = yes
			}
		}
	}

	on_accept = {
		scope:recipient = {
			breedimp_exile_dynasty_member = {
				ACTOR = scope:actor
				RECIPIENT = scope:recipient
			}
		}
	}

	auto_accept = yes
}
